[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 001010011 4
2 000010010 2
3 100000110 3
4 000000000 a
5 110000110 4
6 000001000 1
7 011010011 5

01 10 011010011 5 match 7
12 21 101010011 5
23 32 000010110 3
34 43 000000110 2
45 54 000000000 a match 0 4
56 65 000000000 a match 0 4
67 76 100010010 3
70 07 001010010 3

02 20 001010011 4 match 1
13 31 000010010 2 match 2
24 42 100000110 3 match 3
35 53 000000000 a match 0 4
46 64 110000110 4 match 5
57 75 000001000 1 match 6
60 06 010010011 4
71 17 101010010 4

03 30 000010010 2 match 2
14 41 110000010 3
25 52 000000000 a match 0 4
36 63 000010110 3
47 74 100000010 2
50 05 000000000 a match 0 4
61 16 110010011 5
72 27 101010010 4

04 40 010000010 2
15 51 000000000 a match 0 4
26 62 100010111 5
37 73 000010010 2 match 2
